name: Watercress with Rice and Beans
recipeIngredient: 15 ounces red beans, rinsed and drained
15 ounces black beans, rinsed and drained
15 ounces garbanzo beans, rinsed and drained
fresh rosemary or sage, chopped - to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the brown rice with extra water so that it is slightly soupy when done.
2. Add the cooked wild rice, black beans, red beans, and garbanzo beans.
3. Stir in the chopped garlic, fresh rosemary or sage, salt, and pepper.
4. Spoon the mixture onto beds of watercress.
5. Garnish with chopped cilantro.
